executives.name: Kimberly Ann
executives.background: Ms. Ann has over 30 years of experience in the mining industry, specializing in corporate finance, project development, and management. She was previously the CEO of Carube Copper Corp. and has held various executive roles in junior mining companies.

tenure_dates.title: Founder, CEO, President, Director, Executive Chair
